overall.description: A first-person exploration of a rainy nighttime harbor dock in a video game, featuring wooden warehouses, a paddle steamer, and atmospheric gas lighting. The player walks along wet wooden planks through an industrial waterfront area with crate stacks and period buildings, approaching a gazebo at the pier's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial dock area with paddle steamer and coal warehouse

events.description: turns left to face warehouse with number 1 painted on the wall
turns right entering the open coal yard with stacked wooden crates

agents.ego_description: walking along the dock, examining the paddle steamer and warehouse buildings

entered.detail: large steam-powered riverboat with twin smokestacks docked at the pier
green wooden warehouse with large white number 1 painted on the door
wooden industrial building with 'BASTILLE COAL' painted signage
stacks of wooden shipping crates and boxes
cast iron street lamp with warm yellow glow

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night at a wooden dock with a large paddle steamer visible in the distance. The camera walks forward, turns left to examine a warehouse marked with the number 1, then turns right into an open coal yard filled with crate stacks. Gas lamps provide the only illumination against the dark stormy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between crate stacks and warehouse buildings

events.description: turns left navigating through a narrow path between tall stacks of crates
emerges from narrow passage into open area with American flag building visible

agents.ego_description: navigating through the industrial crate yard, passing between wooden warehouses and stacks of shipping boxes

entered.detail: two-story wooden building with American flag hanging from the balcony
large open-air warehouse with wooden support beams

segments.scene_description: Moving through a narrow industrial corridor formed by towering stacks of wooden crates, the camera navigates tight passages between warehouse buildings. The Bastille Coal building recedes into the distance as an American flag building comes into view on the left, marking the transition to a more open dock area.

scene_state.functional_zone: main boardwalk with saloon buildings and waterfront

events.description: rain becomes visibly heavier, creating reflective wet surfaces on the wooden planks

agents.ego_description: walking along the main boardwalk past the two-story saloon building toward the waterfront gazebo

entered.detail: wooden two-story building with balcony and warm interior lighting
stacks of wooden barrels and scaffolding materials
white painted wooden gazebo with decorative trim at the pier end
park benches lined along the boardwalk

segments.scene_description: The scene opens onto a wider main boardwalk lined with a two-story saloon building on the left. The rain intensifies, creating glossy reflections on the wet wooden planks. The camera passes wooden barrels and scaffolding, approaching a white gazebo structure visible at the end of the pier while benches line the right side of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: pier end with gazebo and ticket office overlooking water

events.description: turns right to circle around the white gazebo structure

agents.ego_description: approaching and circling the gazebo at the pier end, observing the ticket office and waterfront benches

entered.detail: small wooden building with 'OFFICE' signage and lit windows
old-fashioned wooden wheeled cart with canvas cover
small shed structure next to the ticket office

segments.scene_description: The final segment reaches the open pier end where a white gazebo stands prominently against the dark rainy sky. The camera circles the gazebo, passing wooden benches and approaching a small ticket office building with an old wooden cart parked nearby. The dock extends over the water with visible support pilings, creating an atmospheric waterfront scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy industrial harbor that transitions from a cramped coal yard into an open, atmospheric pier. It begins on a wooden dock under a stormy sky, moving past a distant paddle steamer and a numbered warehouse before turning into a coal yard illuminated by flickering gas lamps. As the camera navigates through narrow corridors formed by towering stacks of wooden crates, the industrial density gives way to a wider main boardwalk featuring a two-story saloon and glossy, rain-slicked planks. The scene then expands past wooden barrels and scaffolding toward the end of the pier, where the rain intensifies against the dark horizon. Finally, the movement culminates at the waterfront's edge, circling a prominent white gazebo and a small ticket office with a wooden cart parked beside the support pilings.
